rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Gov't Code §2001.177, which governs costs of preparing agency records for contested case appeals. No overlap or interaction exists.
quote: A state agency by rule may require a party who appeals a final decision in a contested case to pay all or a part of the cost of preparation of the original or a certified copy of the record of the agency proceeding that is required to be sent to the reviewing court.
_note: No conflict; provisions address distinct subject matters.
